LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF RICARDO FRIAS' MOTION TO TRANSFER AND CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED UNDER CCP 403 AND CRC 3.500(C). PLAINTIFF'S MOVING DECLARATION COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.500(C). PAR. 6 OF COUNSEL'S DECLARATION STATES THAT THE CASES ARE NOT COMPLEX. THERE ARE COMMON ISSUES OF LAW AND FACT REGARDING CAUSATION AND DAMAGES. CONSOLIDATION IS NECESSARY TO PREVENT INCONSISTENT RULINGS. TRANSFER AND CONSOLIDATION IMPOSES A BURDEN ON MR. PAYNE, BUT THE PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT CONSOLIDATION IS MORE BURDENSOME. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Transfer And Consolidate
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin Campbell, of Law Offices of Craig A. Holtz, Tel. 818.539.2120 ext 139, for defendants Payne, appearing via CourtCall;
Allysia D. Holland, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6888, for defendants Van Nguyen and Hung Nguyen, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF RICARDO FRIAS' Motion To Transfer And Consolidate is granted under CCP 403 and CRC 3.500(c). Plaintiff's moving declaration complies with CRC 3.500(c). Par. 6 of counsel's declaration states that the cases are not complex. There are common issues of law and fact regarding causation and damages. Consolidation is necessary to prevent inconsistent rulings. Transfer and consolidation imposes a burden on Mr. Payne, but the prejudice to plaintiff without consolidation is more burdensome. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
